test.name: Create Task

kw.name: Authorize
kw.doc: Authorize user to SMTP and IMAP servers.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
kw.msg: The chromedriver version (127.0.6533.99) detected in PATH at C:\Program Files\Autosphere\Browser\chromedriver-win64\chromedriver.exe might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (149.0.7827.201); currently, chromedriver 149.0.7827.155 is recommended for chrome 149.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Typing text 'admin' into text field '//input[@type="text" and @placeholder="Username"]'.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: Typing text 'admin' into text field '//input[@type="password" and @placeholder="Password"]'.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Screenshot
kw.doc: Capture page and/or element screenshot.

kw.name: Upload Via Sftp
kw.msg: hostname = '192.168.1.139' port = 22 username = 'amna' local_path = 'D:\\hello world\\EASYPAISA_ENG.png' remote_path = 'home\\amna\\tabeeb_easypaisa_obd_screenshot' Upload successful!

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.msg: InvalidSelectorException: Message: invalid selector from javascript error: {"status":32,"value":"Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //li//[text()=\"Sign Out\"] because of the following error:\nSyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//li//[text()=\"Sign Out\"]' is not a valid XPath expression."} (Session info: chrome=127.0.6533.99); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalid-selector-exception Stacktrace: GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7D2EC9632+30946] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2E7E3C9] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2D76FDA] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2D7DA57] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2D7FD31] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2D7FDD0] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2DC7F69] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2DC850C] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2E0DCE7] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2DECAAF] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2E0B041] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2DEC813] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2DBA6E5] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2DBB021] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7D2FFF83D+1301229] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7D300BDB7+1351783] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7D3002A03+1313971] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7D2EFDD06+245686] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2E8758F] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2E83804] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2E83992] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2E7A3EF] BaseThreadInitThunk [0x00007FFE415FE957+23] RtlUserThreadStart [0x00007FFE43747C1C+44]

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Screenshot
kw.doc: Capture page and/or element screenshot.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: TABE*B_EASYPAISA_ENG : Job Entry Is Not Found
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keywords
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Send Message
kw.arg: body="this message is sent to inform you about the bot failure"
kw.doc: Send SMTP email

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.status: InvalidSelectorException: Message: invalid selector from javascript error: {"status":32,"value":"Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //li//[text()=\"Sign Out\"] because of the following error:\nSyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//li//[text()=\"Sign Out\"]' is not a valid XPath expression."} (Session info: chrome=127.0.6533.99); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalid-selector-exception Stacktrace: GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7D2EC9632+30946] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2E7E3C9] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2D76FDA] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2D7DA57] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2D7FD31] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2D7FDD0] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2DC7F69] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2DC850C] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2E0DCE7] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2DECAAF] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2E0B041] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2DEC813] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2DBA6E5] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2DBB021] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7D2FFF83D+1301229] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7D300BDB7+1351783] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7D3002A03+1313971] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF7D2EFDD06+245686] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2E8758F] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2E83804] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2E83992] (No symbol) [0x00007FF7D2E7A3EF] BaseThreadInitThunk [0x00007FFE415FE957+23] RtlUserThreadStart [0x00007FFE43747C1C+44]

errors.msg: This is a deprecated import that will be removed in favor of Autosphere.Browser.Selenium

The chromedriver version (127.0.6533.99) detected in PATH at C:\Program Files\Autosphere\Browser\chromedriver-win64\chromedriver.exe might not be compatible with the detected chrome version (149.0.7827.201); currently, chromedriver 149.0.7827.155 is recommended for chrome 149.*, so it is advised to delete the driver in PATH and retry
